# F002. Factor + LightGBM Cross-Sectional Model

## Positioning

This is the first serious step up from pure technicals: factor exposure, a tabular ranker, and a portfolio-aware allocation rule. It should be the default comparison point for any factor model in this repo.

## Reference Basis

- [LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree](../../references/papers/lightgbm_neurips_2017.pdf) - the ranker that turns factor rows into scores
- [View fusion vis-à-vis a Bayesian interpretation of Black-Litterman for portfolio allocation](../../references/papers/2301.13594_black_litterman_fusion.pdf) - posterior view combination for factor blending

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### Fundamental Stack

Point-in-time fundamentals and macro-aware feature joins for slower rebalance cycles.
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - fundamental and macro data loader
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - feature joins and lag alignment
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - tabular score model for the hybrid stack

### Cross-Sectional Ranker

The executable ranking path that turns scores into a tradable long/flat or top-k book.
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - LightGBM scoring model
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - feature matrix construction for the ranker

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Use a point-in-time factor library and the shared loader before the score matrix is built.
- Keep sector, style, and macro features aligned through `src/features/builder.py`.
- Respect the same freshness and slippage assumptions the operational path already enforces.

## Execution Path

- Rank the cross-section with LightGBM and allocate using the existing portfolio/risk rails.
- Let the model behave like a disciplined score generator rather than a black-box allocator.
- Compare the score to a BL-style posterior when factors overlap heavily.

## Risk Controls

- Do not let point-in-time factor availability slip.
- Avoid concentration in a single style bucket.
- Freeze the model whenever the factor data is stale or the heartbeat is broken.

## Validation Gates

- Compare against F001 for raw return and concentration improvement.
- Check whether the factor score actually improves cross-sectional dispersion.
- Verify the model remains stable under different rebalance cadences.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if factor data is too noisy or too delayed to keep in production.
- Archive if the ranker never improves over F001 after costs.
- Archive if the factor overlay becomes hard to interpret.

## Next Step

Use this as the factor-aware baseline for F015 and F025.
